apis.name: 获取设备列表
apis.description: Retrieve all frames associated with your account. Returns frame status, battery level, firmware version, and active family members. Use the returned frame IDs to manage individual frames.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by status: online, offline, low_battery

apis.name: 获取设备详情
apis.description: Get detailed information about a specific frame including hardware specs, storage, Wi-Fi status, and display settings.
apis.requestNote: Replace {id} with the frame ID from the List Frames response.

apis.name: 发送照片
apis.description: Send a photo to a specific frame. The image is automatically optimized for the E Ink Spectra 6 display (color space conversion, contrast enhancement, and dithering). Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP.
apis.requestNote: Provide either image_url for a publicly accessible image, or upload via multipart/form-data with the 'file' field.

apis.name: 获取照片列表
apis.description: Retrieve the list of photos currently stored on a frame. Returns metadata including upload method, uploader, and display count.

apis.name: 删除照片
apis.description: Remove a specific photo from a frame's storage. The frame will update on its next sync cycle (typically within 30 seconds).

apis.name: 生成AI艺术
apis.description: Generate AI artwork optimized for E Ink display. Supports multiple art styles. Processing is self-hosted for privacy — images are generated locally on the frame's edge compute module. Available styles: watercolor, oil_painting, sketch, impressionist, pop_art, minimal, abstract.

params.name: prompt
params.description: Text description of the desired image

params.name: style
params.description: Art style: watercolor, oil_painting, sketch, impressionist, pop_art, minimal, abstract

params.name: color_palette
params.description: Color palette: warm, cool, monochrome, vibrant, pastel

params.name: target_frames
params.description: Comma-separated frame IDs to send the generated art to

apis.name: 获取设备日志
apis.description: Retrieve device logs for a specific frame. Includes connection events, photo syncs, battery status, AI art generation, and errors. Logs are retained for 30 days.

params.name: level
params.description: Filter by level: info, warn, error, debug

params.name: since
params.description: ISO 8601 timestamp — return logs after this time

apis.responseExample: {"logs":[{"id":"log_a1b2","timestamp":"2026-06-20T14:23:45Z","level":"info","source":"S133-9A2B","message":"Photo synced: 3 new images from WeChat Mini Program"}],"total":1}

apis.name: 添加家庭成员
apis.description: Add a family member to a frame. They will receive an invite and can send photos once accepted. Supports email, phone, and WeChat ID invites.

params.name: role
params.description: admin (can manage frame) or member (can send photos only)

apis.name: 配置Webhook
apis.description: Create a webhook endpoint that receives events from your MyFrame account. Supports multiple event types. Events include: photo.uploaded, frame.online, frame.offline, battery.low, ai.art.generated, family.member.added, photo.deleted, sync.completed.

params.name: url
params.description: HTTPS endpoint to receive webhook events

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event types to subscribe to

params.name: secret
params.description: Optional secret for HMAC signature verification

apis.name: 更新固件
apis.description: Trigger a firmware update on a frame. The frame will download and install the latest firmware during its next maintenance window. The frame is unavailable for approximately 5 minutes during the update.

params.name: version
params.description: Specific version to install (default: latest stable)
